testcase.name: LivestreamPanel access control > does not render the video player or stream metadata for unauthenticated users
LivestreamPanel interaction tracking > records play, pause, and seek interactions in the UI event log
useLivestreamAccess > returns authenticated when session has a user
useLivestreamAccess > returns unauthenticated when session has no user
useVideoEventLog > stores interaction events in memory in playback order
MockVideoPlayer (YouTube API abstraction) > emits normalized play, pause, and seek events without loading the YouTube IFrame API
VideoPlayer adapter > uses MockVideoPlayer in tests so YouTube scripts are never loaded
VideoPlayer adapter > can swap to YoutubeIframePlayer when mock mode is disabled
